series_metadata.series_title: Safe At Home Absentee Identification Envelope Supplement
series_metadata.series_description: This record series includes, but is not limited to, the Absent Voter’s Ballot Identification Envelope Supplement and any related materials.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Paper: ninety (90) days an election, or twenty-two (22) months a federal election ; Electronic: ninety (90) days an election, or twenty-two (22) months a federal election
